content.thinking: Let me review the code to verify the fix has been applied correctly.

```typescript

```

This matches the fix instructions exactly. The other attributes (`aria-haspopup`, `aria-expanded`) are unchanged, and the visible '⋮' textContent is unchanged. The fix is minimal and targeted.

I approve this implementation.

content.text: {"approved": true, "feedback": "The fix has been applied exactly as specified in the instructions. The makeRowMenu function already receives `entry: FileEntry`, so entry.name is readily available. No other attributes (aria-haspopup, aria-expanded) were changed, and the visible '⋮' textContent remains intact.
